response.overview: A White man is obsessed with a Black singer who has stage fright, during her comeback concert, she panics, got drunk and passes out in someone's car (turning out to be the man's car). The man does not realize she is in the car until he brings her to his home, at hom, the fan inspires her to sing again.
response.tagline: Film is Lost Media, No Video Found
response.title: Her Biggest Fan
